subcodes.first_line: O sister of the Amir! Thy mention hath been, and shall ever be, in the Most Holy Court. On this day did his honour the Amir attain unto the Presence and make mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اخت امیر ذکرت در ساحت اقدس بوده و هست این یوم جناب امیر بحضور فائز ذکر تو
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
